title: Kitsune Origin
description: Become a Kitsune, Reach godhood or be a humble fox
body:
# Kitsune
To use the shapeshifting abilities Woodwalkers is reqired
### Shared 
- Tails: You start with 1 tail, every 24 real world hours you will grow another increasing your power and granting you new abilities, however dying will cause you to lose a tail
- Armourless: You cant use armour or elytras
- Spotted: Iron Golems and Wolfs will attack you on sight
- Weak: You cant use weapons or preform critical strikes

### Tail 1
- Vulpine Eyes: You have night vision
- Agile: You have increaced agility and dont take fall damage
- Fox: You are trapped in a fox form
- Hands?: You cant use tools

### Tail 2
- Shapeshift: You can change between a human form and your fox form
- Foxfire: Your magic inflicts the target with §bFox Fire§r dealing armour pearcing but not protection damage every second lasting untill it is extinguished. The damage that Fox Fire deals and the effects of abilities that use it increaces as you gain more tails. You are immune to Fox Fire
- Fox Fire Aspect: Your attacks deal Fox Fire damage and inflict Fox Fire

### Tail 3
- Hunters Sight: With concentration, all creatures in your sight glow
- Fox Fire Protection: You take reduced damage and those who attack you are inflicted with Fox Fire

### Tail 4
- Fox's Grace: Agile's effects are increaced
- Fox Fire Toss: You can throw Fox Fire inflicting Fox Fire

### Tail 5
- Advanced Shapeshifting: You can copy the apperance of any entity by looking at it
- Fox Fire Burst: Inflicting Fox Fire on a entity that already has it causes it to burst dealing damage and spreading Fox Fire to nearby entities

### Tail 6
- Veil Of Illusions: You can go invisible until you next attack
- Fox Fire Detonate: Fox Fire Toss is greatly empowered

### Tail 7
- Domain Of Peace: You can take yourself and any entity around you into and out of your realm, if any visitors die in your realm they saved and taken out of your realm
- Fox Fire Aura: You can toggle an aura that constantly inflicts Fox Fire

### Tail 8
- Fox Flight: You can jump while in the air, repeated use allows for flight
- Inhanced Fox Fire: Fox Fire can no longer be extingushed

### Tail 9
- Kyūbi No Kitsune: You no longer lose your tails on death
- Soul Tear: You impale a target with soul fire locking them in place, doing so again will eraise their soul however crouching will instead release the lock

PSA FOR SERVER OWNERS Soul Tear Permanantly kills players and bans them, there is an optional version without permanant killing

Note, I do commissions now. Find me on the origins discord

[https://modrinth.com/mod/woodwalkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodwalkers)
